topWin: Discovered and rotated a committed VAPID private key in the public repo mid-session, then fully activated web push (secrets set, send-push deployed, DB webhook wired) and Cloudflare security headers in the same session.
topGap: Browser entitlement verification still needs SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in local shell; momentum runway critically low at 0.25 sessions.

security: Cloudflare Worker deployed (9 security headers live)
activation: DB webhook wired for classified_files INSERT

ignisNote: Discovering and fixing a committed private key in a public repo mid-session was a high-value security catch; adding the secret lint CI guard means future agents will catch similar patterns automatically before they reach git history.
